equivalents_en: metal container for 4 gallons of liquid (jerry can)

senses.definition_en: metal container for 4 gallons of liquid (jerry can)
senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha chuma cha kuikira madzi ama mafuha, china uwezo wa galoni inne.

examples.dg: Phiya na daba ukahale madzi kisimani.
examples.en: Go with the jerry can and fetch water from the well.
examples.sw: Nenda na daba ukachote maji kisimani.

senses.definition_dg: Ndugu wa chike wa mutu, mwana wa kike wa avyazi amwenga.

examples.dg: Dada wangu ni mkpwulu kunilikpwa mi.
examples.en: My sister is older than me.
examples.sw: Dada yangu ni mkubwa kuliko mimi.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu mdide sana anayeruka na anaumira mutu ama nyama kpwa kumyonya milatso.

examples.dg: Mchekani muna dadadada anji, phahi uipige dawa.
examples.en: There are many fleas in the mat, so treat it with medicine.
examples.sw: Mkekani mna viroboto vingi, kwa hivyo uupige dawa.

senses.definition_dg: Nazi chidide ambacho richikala bado richaiva, rinanywewa madzi gache.

examples.dg: Nipha dafu ninwe madzi gache, nina kiu.
examples.en: Give me a young coconut to drink its water, I'm thirsty.
examples.sw: Nipe dafu ninywe maji yake, nina kiu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuomba chitu ambacho mutu anakudaiwa, kuamba unahaki ya kuphaha chitu.

examples.dg: Iye nkudai pesa ambazo anaedaiwa.
examples.en: He is claiming the money that he is owed.
examples.sw: Yeye anadai pesa anazodaiwa.

senses.definition_dg: Chipimo cha wakati ambacho ni sehemu mwenga ya sitini ya saa moja.

examples.dg: Ngojera dakika kumi ndipho nikusaidiye.
examples.en: Wait ten minutes then I will help you.
examples.sw: Ngoja dakika kumi ndipo nikusaidie.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariyefundzwa kutibu akongo na kuapha dawa.

examples.dg: Dakitari wamupha mkpwongo dawa.
examples.en: The doctor gave the patient medicine.
examples.sw: Daktari alimpa mgonjwa dawa.

equivalents_en: land agent (person who sells land or property for others)

senses.definition_en: land agent (person who sells land or property for others)
senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye kazi yache ni kuuzira atu anjina mashamba ama nyumba.

examples.dg: Dalali wahupahira muguzi wa nyumba yehu.
examples.en: The agent found a buyer for our house.
examples.sw: Dalali alitupalia mnunuzi wa nyumba yetu.

examples.dg: Proverb: Chisicho dambi usichihendere dambi
examples.en: Do not sin against something which has not sin

senses.definition_dg: Madzi matswekune ganagophiya ndani ya mwiri wa mutu ama nyama.

examples.dg: Dakitari wamutsola damu kpwa kumupimira mkpwongo.
examples.en: The doctor drew blood to test the patient.
examples.sw: Daktari alimchukua damu kwa kumpimia mgonjwa.

senses.definition_en: to walk across something balancing carefully
senses.definition_dg: Kutsapa dzulu ya chitu chenye hatari kpwa makini, kunyendeka kpwa uangalifu.

examples.dg: Mwana akadandanda dzulu ya muhi uriogwa.
examples.en: The child carefully walked across the fallen tree.
examples.sw: Mtoto alitembea kwa uangalifu juu ya mti ulioanguka.

equivalents_en: boy who has not yet reached the age of understanding (uncommon usage)

senses.definition_en: boy who has not yet reached the age of understanding (uncommon usage)
senses.definition_dg: Mwana wa chilume ambaye richikala bado ni mdide sana.

examples.dg: Dang'a ra mwana
examples.en: A young child
examples.sw: Mtoto mdogo bado hajafikia umri wa kuelewa.

senses.definition_en: to be puzzled, to be perplexed
senses.definition_dg: Kukala humanyire ra kuhenda, kuchanganyikiwa na kusitosita.

examples.dg: Hwadangana kpwa mana tahwamanya njira ya kuphiya.
examples.en: We were puzzled because we didn't know the way to go.
examples.sw: Tulikuwa na wasiwasi kwa sababu hatukujua njia ya kwenda.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chilichodzengbwa dzulu ya muho ama bonde kpwa kutsapiria.

examples.dg: Daraja ra muho radzengbwa mwaka uhu.
examples.en: The river bridge was built this year.
examples.sw: Daraja la mto lilijengwa mwaka huu.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya dzulu ya ndani ya nyumba, phatu phenye bamba.

examples.dg: Dari ya nyumba yehu ikadzengbwa na mbao.
examples.en: The ceiling of our house was made of wood.
examples.sw: Dari ya nyumba yetu ilijengwa kwa mbao.

senses.definition_en: to keep off, to get out of the way
senses.definition_dg: Kuepuka chitu, kuphiya kanda ili usikutane na hatari.

examples.dg: Nkadarika nchiphoona diya riredza
examples.en: I got out of the way when I saw a dog coming
examples.sw: Nilihepa nilipona gari linakuja.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kulolerya vitu vya kure chikavionyese vinono.

examples.dg: Darubini inahumirwa kuona nyenyezi.
examples.en: A telescope is used to see stars.
examples.sw: Darubini inatumika kuona nyota.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachohumirwa kutibu ukongo ama kundziza mwiri kpwa wadudu.

examples.dg: Dakitari wamupha dawa ya kumiza.
examples.en: The doctor gave him medicine to swallow.
examples.sw: Daktari alimpa dawa ya kumeza.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha chuma cha kuikira vitu, china uwezo wa lita ishirini.

examples.dg: Tiya madzi ndani ya debe na uhiike kanda.
examples.en: Put water in the container and put it aside.
examples.sw: Tia maji ndani ya debe na uliweke kando.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mwiri usio na nguvu, kukala mnyonge.

examples.dg: Ariphokala mkpwongo, wadebweka sana hadi kasiweza kunyendeka.
examples.en: When he was sick, he became so weak he couldn't walk.
examples.sw: Alipokuwa mgonjwa, alidhoofika sana hadi hakuweza kutembea.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka kpwa kuyumba-yumba, kutokuwa na usawa.

examples.dg: Mzehe nkudedeleka kpwa mana maguluge gasiwe na nguvu.
examples.en: The elder staggers because his legs are weak.
examples.sw: Mzee anapepesuka kwa sababu miguu yake haina nguvu.

equivalents_en: be unsteady (like a child learning to walk)

senses.definition_en: to be unsteady (like a child learning to walk)
senses.definition_dg: Kukala si thabiti, kuyumba-yumba dza mwana anayeandza kunyendeka.

examples.dg: Mwana mdide nkutsapa dega-dega hadi akaanguka.
examples.en: The small child walks unsteadily until he falls.
examples.sw: Mtoto mdogo anatembea kwa kuyumba hadi akaanguka.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho si chigumu, chinachezacheza.

examples.dg: Dimba hiri ni dega-dega, rinahitaji kukpwazwa.
examples.en: This nail is loose, it needs to be hammered.
examples.sw: Msumari huu unachezacheza, unahitaji kupigwa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuinama kpwa upande mmwenga, kupindika.

examples.dg: Chombo cha madzi chikadeguka na madzi gakamwagika.
examples.en: The water container tipped over and the water spilled.
examples.sw: Chombo cha maji kiliinama na maji yakamwagika.

senses.definition_dg: Kutahiri mutu wa chilume kpwa kumtseka ngozi ya utumewe.

examples.dg: Kpwa mila zehu, alume anadekpwa wakati wa ujana.
examples.en: In our tradition, males are circumcised during youth.
examples.sw: Kwa mila zetu, wanaume wanatahiriwa wakati wa ujana.

equivalents_en: tail of a hare or rabbit

senses.definition_en: tail of a hare or rabbit
senses.definition_dg: Mkira wa sungura ama chisungura.

examples.dg: Dele ra sungura ni dide sana.
examples.en: A rabbit's tail is very small.
examples.sw: Mkia wa sungura ni mdogo sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu dzulu kpwa kuchinika, kutundika.

examples.dg: Delesa nguo hizo dzulu ya kamba.
examples.en: Hang those clothes on the line.
examples.sw: Ning'iniza nguo hizo juu ya kamba.

equivalents_en: trap made from a rope suspended from a tensed pole so that the

senses.definition_en: trap made from a rope suspended from a tensed pole so that the
senses.definition_dg: Mtego unaohendwa kpwa kamba inayonikpwa dzulu ya muhi uliobendulwa.

examples.dg: Delesa ya kurya nyama wa tsakani ikaikpwa njirani.
examples.en: A rope trap for catching forest animals was placed on the path.
examples.sw: Mtego wa kamba wa kukamata wanyama wa porini uliwekwa njiani.

sub_entries.definition_en: will be suspended from the ground

senses.definition_dg: Kushindwa kpwa adui ama kpwa dzambo, kuangamizwa.

examples.dg: Adui akadelwa kpwa viha hivyo.
examples.en: The enemy was overcome in that battle.
examples.sw: Adui walishindwa katika vita hivyo.

senses.definition_en: to walk slowly after a sickness
senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka pole pole sana bada ya kukala mkpwongo.

examples.dg: Bada ya ukongo mure, mzehe nkutsapa dema-dema.
examples.en: After the long illness, the elder walks very slowly.
examples.sw: Baada ya ugonjwa mrefu, mzee anatembea polepole sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kipande cha nguo ambayo ikakala demu, imechakala.

examples.dg: Usa demu kuphangira meza.
examples.en: Use the rag to wipe the table.
examples.sw: Tumia kitambara kupangusa meza.

senses.definition_dg: Kumugomba mutu kpwa ukali kpwa sababu akahenda kosa.

examples.dg: Baba wamdemula mwanawe ariyeremwa kusoma.
examples.en: Father scolded his child who refused to study.
examples.sw: Baba alimkaripia mtoto wake aliyekataa kusoma.

senses.definition_dg: Kukaripia mutu, kumugombera kpwa ukali.

examples.dg: Mwalimu wamudemurira mwanafundzi ariyehenda makosa.
examples.en: The teacher scolded the student who made mistakes.
examples.sw: Mwalimu alimkaripia mwanafunzi aliyefanya makosa.

senses.definition_dg: Pepho wa Chidigo ambaye anaaminiwa ni atu a kare.

examples.dg: Atu a kare kala nkuamini Dena anaweza kuhendza vinono ama vibaya.
examples.en: People in the old days believed the Digo spirit could do good or bad.
examples.sw: Watu wa zamani waliamini pepo wa Kidigo anaweza kufanya mema au mabaya.

senses.definition_dg: Pesa ama chitu ambacho mutu anadaiwa ni mutu wanjina.

examples.dg: Ninahitaji kuripha deni rangu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.
examples.en: I need to pay my debt before the end of the month.
examples.sw: Ninahitaji kulipa deni langu kabla ya mwisho wa mwezi.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye kazi yache ni kuendesha gari ama basi.

examples.dg: Dereva wa basi anavinyendesa magari kpwa uangalifu.
examples.en: The bus driver drives carefully.
examples.sw: Dereva wa basi anaendesha kwa uangalifu.

senses.definition_dg: Kundi ra vitu kumi na viiri virivyoikpwa phamwenga.

examples.dg: Gula derezeni moja ya mayai.
examples.en: Buy one dozen eggs.
examples.sw: Nunua dazeni moja ya mayai.

senses.definition_dg: Kuisha siku yosi phatu, kutumia wakati kula ligundzu hadi dzambarau.

examples.dg: Atu anji anaderwa mndani
examples.en: Many people are spending the day in the fields
examples.sw: Watu wengi wanashinda kijijini.

examples.dg: (See: sinda) Ukaderwadze?
examples.en: How have you spent the day?
examples.sw: Watu wengi wanashinda kijijini.

senses.definition_dg: Njira ambayo atu a phatu fulani anavyohenda mambo gao kula kare.

examples.dg: Desturi za Adigo ni za muhimu sana.
examples.en: The customs of the Digo people are very important.
examples.sw: Desturi za Wadigo ni muhimu sana.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu pha photsi phenye miango ya pande mbiri, bonde.

examples.dg: Muho unapita kahi-kahi ya dete.
examples.en: The river passes through the middle of the valley.
examples.sw: Mto unapita katikati ya bonde.

equivalents_en: Islamic ritual for the appeasement or exorcism of spirits

senses.definition_en: Islamic ritual for the appeasement or exorcism of spirits
senses.definition_sw: dhikiri, ngoma ya Kiislamu ya kupunga pepo
senses.definition_dg: Ngoma ya Chiislamu ya kupiga pepho ama kutosha pepho.

examples.dg: Dhikiri ikahendwa usiku wa dzana kpwa kutibu mutu wa pepho.
examples.en: An Islamic spirit ritual was performed last night to treat a person with spirits.
examples.sw: Dhikiri ilifanywa usiku wa jana kwa kutibu mtu mwenye pepo.

senses.definition_en: a pit, a large hole in the ground
senses.definition_dg: Shimo kulu kpwa photsi ya tsi.

examples.dg: Jihadhari na dibwa rira njirani, undaanguka.
examples.en: Be careful of that pit on the road, you will fall.
examples.sw: Jihadhari na shimo lile njiani, utaanguka.

equivalents_sw: the current section has been written primarily for the benefit of people for

senses.definition_sw: the current section has been written primarily for the benefit of people for

senses.definition_dg: Kukala si kukpwulu, kukala na chipimo chidide.

examples.dg: Mwana iye richikala ni mdide sana.
examples.en: That child is still very small.
examples.sw: Mtoto yule bado ni mdogo sana.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya photsi ya madzi, kuzama.

examples.dg: Boti ikadidimiya kahi-kahi ya bahari.
examples.en: The boat sank in the middle of the sea.
examples.sw: Boti ilididimia katikati ya bahari.

equivalents_en: force something to be submerged in water

senses.definition_en: to force something to be submerged in water
senses.definition_dg: Kushindiza chitu photsi ya madzi kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Usididimize mwana wako madzini, ni hatari.
examples.en: Don't submerge your child in water, it's dangerous.
examples.sw: Usimzamishe mtoto wako majini, ni hatari.

senses.definition_en: from Swahili (for example, Swahili zuia is zuwiya in Digo). Here are some
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra Chiingereza rinaonyesa tofauti.

examples.dg: Chidigo ni tofauti na Chiswahili kpwa njira nyinji.
examples.en: Digo is different from Swahili in many ways.
examples.sw: Kidigo ni tofauti na Kiswahili kwa njia nyingi.

senses.definition_dg: Ukongo wa hatari unaogwira koo na kuhendza mutu kasiweze kumiza.

examples.dg: Difiteria ni ukongo wa hatari hasa kpwa ana adide.
examples.en: Diphtheria is a dangerous disease especially for small children.
examples.sw: Difiteria ni ugonjwa hatari hasa kwa watoto wadogo.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka kpwa haraka sana kpwa magulu, kukimbia.

examples.dg: Mwana nkudiganya kuphiya sukuli kpwa mana akahelwa.
examples.en: The child is running to school because he is late.
examples.sw: Mtoto anakimbia kwenda shule kwa sababu amechelewa.

senses.definition_dg: Siki ya phatu hipho, madzi makali ga kuphikira.

examples.dg: Digbwa inahumirwa kupikira mchuzi wa samaki.
examples.en: Local vinegar is used for cooking fish stew.
examples.sw: Siki ya kienyeji inatumika kupikia mchuzi wa samaki.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa kukala chitu chinaenderera wakati wosi, kutwa ndzima.

examples.dg: Msikale na tsukizi dzuwa dii
examples.en: Do not remain angry until the sun sets
examples.sw: Msikae na hasira kutwa nzima.

examples.dg: Msihendere ana enu vibako kpwa kualaumu dii yosi
examples.en: Do not provoke your children to anger by criticising them all day long
examples.sw: Msikae na hasira kutwa nzima.

senses.definition_dg: Shimo riri na madzi, phatu phenye chetse.

examples.dg: Dimbwi ra madzi rimedzala bada ya mvula.
examples.en: The swamp filled up after the rain.
examples.sw: Dimbwi la maji limejaa baada ya mvua.

senses.definition_dg: Kumugombera mutu kpwa ukali, kukaripia.

examples.dg: Mzehe wamudimula barobaro ariyekosa heshima.
examples.en: The elder rebuked the young man who was disrespectful.
examples.sw: Mzee alimkaripia kijana aliyekosa heshima.

senses.definition_en: to keep on, continue, stay firm
senses.definition_dg: Kuenderera kuhenda chitu, kukala imara na kusiricha.

examples.dg: Dina na kazi hata ichikala ni ngumu.
examples.en: Keep on with the work even if it is hard.
examples.sw: Kazana na kazi hata ikawa ngumu.

senses.definition_dg: Kukaza chitu kpwa nguvu ili chisiwe kipore.

examples.dg: Kufunga fundo kudina
examples.en: To tie a knot tightly
examples.sw: Kufunga fundo kwa nguvu, kukaza.

sub_entries.definition_en: to be brave, to stand firm, to be encouraged
sub_entries.definition_sw: kujipa moyo, kukatiwa moyo, kupata moyo, kusimama imara

senses.definition_dg: Kutikisa chitu ama kutikiswa kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Barabara hino ina madibwa, inadindirisa sana
examples.en: This road has lots of holes, it bounces you around a lot
examples.sw: Barabara hii ina mashimo, inatikisa sana.

equivalents_sw: mabaki yanayolika yanayopatikana baada ya kupika mafuta ya nazi

senses.definition_en: dregs of boiled coconut milk, edible by-product of making coconut oil
senses.definition_sw: mabaki yanayolika yanayopatikana baada ya kupika mafuta ya nazi
senses.definition_dg: Masazo ga nazi bada ya kubiywa na kutulusa mafuha, ganaweza kuriwa.

examples.dg: Dindiya za nazi zinaweza kuriwa na mchuzi.
examples.en: The coconut milk dregs can be eaten with stew.
examples.sw: Mabaki ya nazi yanaweza kuliwa na mchuzi.

equivalents_en: grey beetle with yellow spots with a sharp edge at the back of its

senses.definition_en: grey beetle with yellow spots with a sharp edge at the back of its
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya dudu wa rangi ya kijivujivu yenye alama za mandano na ncha kali nyuma.

examples.dg: Dingo anaweza kukuumiza kpwa nchaye ya nyuma.
examples.en: The beetle can hurt you with its sharp back edge.
examples.sw: Mdudu anaweza kukuumiza kwa ncha yake ya nyuma.

sub_entries.definition_en: can be used to cut small items such as grass stems
sub_entries.definition_sw: aina ya dundu mwenye madoa ya manjano wenye makali nyuma ya kichwa kinachotumika kukata vitu vidogo kama nyasi

senses.definition_dg: Njira ya kuabudu na kuamini ambayo mutu anailungira.

examples.dg: Atu a phatu hipho ana dini tofauti-tofauti.
examples.en: The people of that place have different religions.
examples.sw: Watu wa mahali hapo wana dini tofauti-tofauti.

senses.definition_en: to be firm, to hold firm (to objects or to beliefs), to keep control of
senses.definition_dg: Kukala imara na kusiricha, kushika ngumu kpwa chitu ama imani.

examples.dg: Dinisa imaniyo na usiiche.
examples.en: Hold firm to your beliefs and don't let go.
examples.sw: Shika imani yako kwa nguvu na usiache.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala chikakpwazwa, chikaikpwa chinono.

examples.dg: Dimba rikadiniswa na sasa ni imara.
examples.en: The nail was tightened and now it is firm.
examples.sw: Msumari ulikuzwa na sasa ni imara.

senses.definition_dg: Kupunguza nyere za mutu kpwa kutseka na wembe ama chisu.

examples.dg: Baba waphiya kudira nyere zache dukani.
examples.en: Father went to have his hair cut at the shop.
examples.sw: Baba alikwenda kunyoa nywele zake dukani.

senses.definition_dg: Tundu ra ukutani ra nyumba ambaro rinainjiza mwanga na hewa.

examples.dg: Vugula dirisha ili hewa iinjire ndani.
examples.en: Open the window so that air enters inside.
examples.sw: Fungua dirisha ili hewa iingie ndani.

senses.definition_dg: Chombo cha kuryera ama kuikira chakurya, bakuli.

examples.dg: Ika chakurya ndani ya dishi rikulu.
examples.en: Put the food in the big dish.
examples.sw: Weka chakula ndani ya bakuli kubwa.

senses.definition_sw: wild dog (Lycaon pictus); bweha, mbwa mwitu
senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa tsakani anayefwanana na mbwa, ariye werevu na anakala kpwa makundi.

examples.dg: Diya ni nyama wa hatari kpwa mifugo.
examples.en: The wild dog is a dangerous animal for livestock.
examples.sw: Mbwa mwitu ni mnyama hatari kwa mifugo.

equivalents_sw: namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu

senses.definition_sw: namna ya samaki ya kulika na wanadamu
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya samaki anayeishi baharini ambaye anaweza kuriwa.

examples.dg: Dizi ni samaki mnono wa kuhenda mchuzi.
examples.en: Dizi is a good fish for making stew.
examples.sw: Dizi ni samaki mzuri wa kupikia mchuzi.

senses.definition_dg: Neno rinaonyesa rangi ya kundu kali sana, dza milatso.

examples.dg: Mwezi uchikala kundu do-do-do dza mlatso
examples.en: The moon became bright red like blood
examples.sw: Mwezi ukiwa mwekundu sana kama damu.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye kazi yache ni kuosha nguwo za atu anjina.

examples.dg: Dobi waosha nguwo zehu chila wiki.
examples.en: The laundryman washes our clothes every week.
examples.sw: Dobi anaosha nguo zetu kila wiki.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi kutuluka tone bada ya tone kula phatu pha dzulu.

examples.dg: Madzi ganadoda kula darini kpwa sababu ya mvula.
examples.en: Water is dripping from the ceiling because of the rain.
examples.sw: Maji yanadondoka kutoka darini kwa sababu ya mvua.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya photsi ya madzi, kuzama.

examples.dg: Chombo chikadodomera kahi-kahi ya bahari.
examples.en: The vessel sank in the middle of the ocean.
examples.sw: Chombo kilizama katikati ya bahari.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda sauti ya kutarika-tarika, kama moho uchiaka.

examples.dg: Kuni zinadodoreka dzikoni kpwa moho mkali.
examples.en: The firewood is crackling in the kitchen from the hot fire.
examples.sw: Kuni zinatatarika jikoni kwa moto mkali.

senses.definition_en: to tear, to break off, to come apart (e.g. a piece of rope)
senses.definition_dg: Chitu kutseka, kuvundzika, kama kamba ikitseka.

examples.dg: Kamba ikadoka; achiyeidosa, simanya ni yuphi
examples.en: The rope has broken; who it was who broke it, I do not know
examples.sw: Kamba ilikatika; aliyeivuta, sijui ni nani.

senses.definition_dg: Kpwa chipimo chidide-chidide, kidogo kidogo.

examples.dg: Proverb: Doko-doko yamala chiphinda
examples.en: Bit by bit finishes the basket
examples.sw: Haba na haba hujaza kibaba.

senses.definition_dg: Kuganya chitu kahi ya atu, kupha chila mutu sehemu yache.

examples.dg: Dokola chakurya hicho kpwa usawa.
examples.en: Share that food equally.
examples.sw: Gawanya chakula hicho kwa usawa.

senses.definition_en: to cut a small piece from something
senses.definition_dg: Kutseka chipande chidide kula kpwa chitu chikulu.

examples.dg: Dokola kipande cha mkpwahe uniphe.
examples.en: Cut a small piece of bread and give it to me.
examples.sw: Kata kipande kidogo cha mkate na unipe.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsola maua, mbeyu, ama matunda kula muhini.

examples.dg: Ana akaphiya kudola maua tsakani.
examples.en: The children went to pick flowers in the forest.
examples.sw: Watoto walikwenda kuchuma maua msituni.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya dungunyula.

examples.dg: Usimudone mwana, ni vibaya.
examples.en: Don't pinch the child, it's wrong.
examples.sw: Usimfinye mtoto, ni vibaya.

senses.definition_dg: Unga wa muhindi wa kugula dukani kpwa kuphikira ugali.

examples.dg: Gula dona dukani kpwa kuphikira ugali.
examples.en: Buy maize flour from the shop for making ugali.
examples.sw: Nunua unga wa mahindi dukani kwa kupikia ugali.

senses.definition_dg: Kupepeta mimea ili mbeyu zituluke na makodza gasale.

examples.dg: Mayo nkudondola mphunga kpwa kuutenga na makodza.
examples.en: Mother is sifting rice to separate it from husks.
examples.sw: Mama anadondoa mchele kwa kuutenga na makapi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukanda madomo dzulu ya ngozi ya mutu wanjina kpwa upendo.

examples.dg: Mayo wamudonera mwanawe chitswani.
examples.en: Mother kissed her child on the head.
examples.sw: Mama alimbusu mtoto wake kichwani.

equivalents_en: bend over (impolite expression - used of female ready for sex)

senses.definition_en: to bend over (impolite expression - used of female ready for sex)
senses.definition_dg: Kuinama kpwa njira ya kupinda mwiri.

examples.dg: Proverb: Wa likpwale kaambwa dong'ola
examples.en: The lustful one is never told to bend over
examples.sw: Mwanamke wa Kwale haambiwi kuinama.

senses.definition_dg: Kipande cha udongo ama tope ririchokpwazwa.

examples.dg: Ana anacheza na madongo kpwa kuhenda vihumbe.
examples.en: The children are playing with clay to make shapes.
examples.sw: Watoto wanacheza na udongo kwa kutengeneza viumbe.

senses.definition_en: to pinch, e.g. to pinch a child as a form of punishment
senses.definition_dg: Kukpwamula ngozi ya mutu kpwa kumuumiza, kufinya.

examples.dg: Usimudongonyole mwana, ni vibaya.
examples.en: Don't pinch the child, it's wrong.
examples.sw: Usimfinye mtoto, ni vibaya.

senses.definition_dg: Tonge ra ugali ama unga unaokpwalwa kpwa mkpwono.

examples.dg: Proverb: Donje kugbwa ni mlungu wa diya
examples.en: A fallen piece of ugali is (caused by) the god of dogs
examples.sw: Tonge kubwa ni la bwana wa mbwa mwitu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuvundza chitu kama kamba kpwa kuikokota.

examples.dg: Kamba ikadoswa hadi ikadoka.
examples.en: The rope was pulled until it broke.
examples.sw: Kamba ilivutwa hadi ikakatika.

senses.definition_dg: Kufwa kpwa karibuni, (neno ra heshima).

examples.dg: Jirani wehu akadosa wiki iriyophiya.
examples.en: Our neighbor passed away last week.
examples.sw: Jirani yetu alifariki wiki iliyopita.

equivalents_en: empty shell of a young coconut

senses.definition_en: empty shell of a young coconut
senses.definition_dg: Ganda ra nazi dide risirokala na nyama, fuvu ra dafu.

examples.dg: Madudu ga nazi ganahumirwa kpwa kuasira moho.
examples.en: Empty coconut shells are used for lighting fires.
examples.sw: Maganda ya nazi yanatumika kwa kuwashia moto.

senses.definition_dg: Kukimbia na kuinjira ndani ya mutsere ama tsakani.

examples.dg: Chiphala chadudula tsakani chiriphokala chinazoreswa
examples.en: The antelope ran into a thicket whilst it was being pursued
examples.sw: Paa alikimbia msituni alipokuwa anafukuzwa.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa kuruka mkpwulu ariye rangi ya hudhurungi na nyerupe, ana sauti ya ajabu.

examples.dg: Dugudu nkuiha dzuwani kpwa sauti yache ya ajabu.
examples.en: The coucal calls out in the sun with its distinctive voice.
examples.sw: Tipitipi anaita juani kwa sauti yake ya ajabu.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphiya photsi ya madzi, kuzama.

examples.dg: Meli ikadugumira baharini.
examples.en: The ship sank in the ocean.
examples.sw: Meli ilizama baharini.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapha bidhaa zinauzwa, nyumba ya kuuzira vitu.

examples.dg: Naphiya dukani kugula chumvi.
examples.en: I'm going to the shop to buy salt.
examples.sw: Naenda dukani kununua chumvi.

senses.definition_en: to settle, to alight, to land on (like a bird)
senses.definition_dg: Nyama wa kuruka kusagala dzulu ya chitu, kutua.

examples.dg: Nyama wa kuruka akadulama dzulu ya muhi.
examples.en: The bird settled on top of the tree.
examples.sw: Ndege alikaa juu ya mti.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na mwiri mkpwulu kupita chipimo, kumera.

examples.dg: Mbuzi yehu ni dumbulo kuriko mbuzi za jirani.
examples.en: Our goat is larger than the neighbor's goats.
examples.sw: Mbuzi wetu ni mnene kuliko mbuzi wa jirani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuenderera kukala kpwa wakati mure, kudumu.

examples.dg: Amani ya phatu hipho yadumu kpwa miaka minji.
examples.en: The peace of that place lasted for many years.
examples.sw: Amani ya mahali hapo ilidumu kwa miaka mingi.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu kuruka dzulu bada ya kupiga photsi, kudunda.

examples.dg: Mpira ukadunda dzulu ya ukuta.
examples.en: The ball bounced over the wall.
examples.sw: Mpira ulidunda juu ya ukuta.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchoma kpwa sindano ama chisu mara nyinji.

examples.dg: Usidundunge mutu na sindano iyo.
examples.en: Don't pierce that person repeatedly with that needle.
examples.sw: Usimchome mtu kwa sindano hiyo mara kwa mara.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka kpwa siri bila mutu kukumanya, kunyemelea.

examples.dg: Mwivi akadundurika hadi phepini pa nyumba.
examples.en: The thief crept up to the side of the house.
examples.sw: Mwizi alinyemelea hadi pembeni ya nyumba.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika chitu phatu kpwa kuchihifadhi, kulimbika.

examples.dg: Dunduriza chakurya kpwa wakati wa njala.
examples.en: Store food for a time of famine.
examples.sw: Limbika chakula kwa wakati wa njaa.

senses.definition_dg: Kuchoma chitu kpwa ncha kali, dza sindano ama mkuki.

examples.dg: Sindano ikanidunga chala changu.
examples.en: The needle pricked my finger.
examples.sw: Sindano ilinichoma kidole changu.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba maneno ga kusifiwa kupita chipimo, kutia chumvi.

examples.dg: Usigombe dunge-dunge, gomba ukpweli bahi.
examples.en: Don't exaggerate, just speak the truth.
examples.sw: Usitie chumvi, sema ukweli tu.

senses.definition_dg: Nyumba ndide ya kuikira nafaka bada ya kuvuna, uchaga.

examples.dg: Dungu ya muhindi ikadzala mwaka huno.
examples.en: The granary for maize is full this year.
examples.sw: Uchaga wa mahindi umejaa mwaka huu.

senses.definition_dg: Dudu mure ariye magulu ga mbere dza mikpwono ya kuswali, anakala wadudu anjina.

examples.dg: Dungudungu anakala wadudu anjina adide.
examples.en: The praying mantis eats other small insects.
examples.sw: Vunjajungu anakula wadudu wengine wadogo.

senses.definition_en: to pinch, e.g. to pinch a child as a form of punishment
senses.definition_dg: Kukpwamula ngozi ya mutu kpwa vidole viiri kpwa kumuumiza.

examples.dg: Mayo wamudungunyula mwanawe kpwa kumurudi.
examples.en: Mother pinched her child to discipline him.
examples.sw: Mama alimfinya mtoto wake kwa kumrudi.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapho atu osi anaishi, dunia yosi.

examples.dg: Atu a dunia yosi ni ndugu.
examples.en: All people in the world are brothers.
examples.sw: Watu wa dunia yote ni ndugu.

senses.definition_en: cashew fruit in green, unripe stage
senses.definition_dg: Tunda ra muhindi wa korosho richikala bado ni mbichi na si kuiva.

examples.dg: Dunje tayirwe kpwa mana bado taidiiva.
examples.en: The unripe cashew fruit is not eaten because it hasn't ripened yet.
examples.sw: Dunge halililiwi kwa sababu bado halijaiva.

senses.definition_dg: Nyama mdide wa baharini ariye magulu manji, anahumirwa kpwa kupikira.

examples.dg: Dura ni nono sana ichiphikpwa na nazi.
examples.en: Shrimp is very delicious when cooked with coconut.
examples.sw: Kamba ni nzuri sana ikipikwa na nazi.

senses.definition_dg: Kushangala na kukala huwezi kugomba kpwa mana ya ajabu.

examples.dg: Hwaduwala huriphoona mambo gara ga ajabu.
examples.en: We were dumbfounded when we saw those strange things.
examples.sw: Tuliduwaa tulipoona mambo yale ya ajabu.

senses.definition_dg: Sauti ya madzi ganaphododa tone bada ya tone.

examples.dg: Matone ga mvula ganamwagika dwe-dwe-dwe
examples.en: The raindrops are dripping down
examples.sw: Matone ya mvua yanadondoka tone baada ya tone.

equivalents_en: become sticky when decomposing or going off (usually used of

senses.definition_en: to become sticky when decomposing or going off (usually used of
senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinachola na kukala chinanika, kuhenda unata.

examples.dg: Samaki hiye akadyadya kpwa mana sidzangbweikpwa barafuni.
examples.en: That fish became sticky because it wasn't kept in the freezer.
examples.sw: Samaki yule alioza kwa sababu hakuwekwa kwenye friji.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kuwa majimaji wakati wa kuoza ama kuvunda

equivalents_en: sit or stand with legs apart

senses.definition_en: to sit or stand with legs apart
senses.definition_dg: Kusagala ama kusimama ukagolosa magulu.

examples.dg: Akadyahuka, ndiyo sababu tsungula akatsapa kahi-kahi ya maguluge
examples.en: He had his legs apart, that is why the hare passed between his legs
examples.sw: Alikaa miguu wazi, ndiyo sababu sisimizi alipita katikati ya miguu yake.

senses.definition_dg: Kuphanua magulu, kugolosa magulu kpwa upande na upande.

examples.dg: Usidyahule magulu ukasagale mbere za atu.
examples.en: Don't sit with your legs open in front of people.
examples.sw: Usipanue miguu ukikaa mbele za watu.
